name: BoostUp Revenue Intelligence API
what_it_does: AI-powered revenue intelligence platform with REST API — providing ML-based sales forecasting, deal risk scoring, pipeline inspection, conversational intelligence, and coaching recommendations to help revenue teams improve forecast accuracy and win rates.
use_cases: Querying AI-powered deal risk scores for sales manager pipeline review workflows
Pulling forecast projections by segment, region, or rep for revenue operations reporting
Integrating deal health signals with CRM for automatic opportunity stage updates
Monitoring pipeline coverage ratios and gap analysis for sales planning
Automating coaching prioritization by surfacing at-risk deals for manager intervention
not_for: Sales outbound engagement and sequencing (use Salesloft or Outreach)
best_when: An enterprise revenue operations team using Salesforce or HubSpot wants AI-powered forecast accuracy improvement, deal risk insights, and pipeline health visibility without replacing their CRM.
avoid_when: You need outbound sales engagement, marketing analytics, or a lighter CRM-embedded forecasting (use Salesforce Einstein for simpler needs).

auth.notes: API token from BoostUp account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for forecast updates and deal alerts. No OAuth2. CRM integration (Salesforce, HubSpot, Dynamics 365) via separate OAuth flow. Conversational intelligence via call recording integration.

pricing.notes: Santa Clara, CA-based company. Founded 2018. Raised $14M. AI forecast engine unique differentiator: explainable AI shows why forecast differs from CRM. Revenue Signal Monitor for anomaly detection. Conversational intelligence captures call and email signals. Salesforce AppExchange native integration.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for forecast data, deals, pipeline, and coaching. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. CRM integration required before meaningful deal data is available. AI forecasts are updated periodically — not real-time. Revenue Signal anomalies require tuning after initial deployment.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Forecast reads fully idempotent by period. Deal reads idempotent. Pipeline reads idempotent. Coaching recommendations reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: CRM integration required — without Salesforce/HubSpot connection, no deal data
Conversational intelligence requires Gong, Chorus, or call recording integration
AI forecasts updated daily, not real-time — implement appropriate refresh cadence
Annual contract required — API access reflects contract scope
Explainable AI factors in forecast — query explanation endpoint for context

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Revenue and deal data is highly sensitive — restrict API key access to authorized integrations only. CRM sync requires read access to pipeline data — implement least privilege.
